title: RNA to cDNA and RT-PCR protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bkj5b","text":"Used applied biosystems high-capacity RNA-to-cDNA kit and fast SYBR green master mix protocol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"b4h1c","text":"Use up to 2 μg of total RNA per 20-μL reaction","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3rcf6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"2ked","text":"RNA-to-cDNA:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4u0sc","text":"2X RT buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"65fg1","text":"2X RT enzyme","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"er1ig","text":"RNA sample","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8deb5","text":"384 -or 96-well plate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"evn2h","text":"8-cap and tube strip","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e7tt9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5ha95","text":"RT-PCR:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dr533","text":"Fast SYBR Green Master Mix ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fou7q","text":"cDNA samples ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f9ubh","text":"Primers ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"25c1a","text":"RNase-free water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2gk47","text":"7900HT PCR instrument","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9s20k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare the RT reaction mix 2X buffer mix : 10 µL 20X RT enzyme Mix: 1 µL RNA sample: < 9 µL Nuclease-free water: quantity sufficient to 20 µL Total per reaction: 20 µL
Prepare the reverse transcription reactions: Aliquot 20 µL RT reaction mix into each well Seal the plates and centrifuge to spin down the contents and remove air bubbles Store them on ice

Perform reverse transcription: Step1: Temp. 37 °C , time: 60 mins Step2: Temp. 95 °C , time: 5 mins Step3: Temp. 4 °C , time: unlimited Store the cDNA: Short-term: < 24 hours before use and store at 2−8°C Long-term: store at −25°C to −15°C

For one reaction: Fast SYBR® Green Master Mix (2✕) : 10 µL Forward and Reverse Primers : variable cDNA template + RNase-free water: variable Total: 20 µL Mix by gentle inversion, then centrifuge the tube to spin down the contents and eliminate any air bubbles
Transfer the appropriate volume of each reaction to 384-well reaction plate

Instrument: 7900HT AmpliTaq Fast DNA Polymerase, UP Activation : Temp. 95 °C , time 10 mins, Cycles HOLD Denature : Temp. 95 °C , time 1second Temp. 60 °C , time 20 seconds Anneal/extend: Temp. 95 °C , time 15 seconds Temp. 60 °C , time 15 seconds Temp. 95 °C , time 15 seconds Reaction volume: 20 µL MicroAmp Optical 384-Well Reaction Plate
creator: Jing Jin
